title: Equals and the comparison operators should be overridden when implementing IComparable
description: "Equals" and the comparison operators should be overridden when implementing "IComparable"Analyze your codeintentionality-completemaintainabilityCode SmellWhy is this an issue?When you implementIComparableorIComparable<T>on a class you should also overrideEquals(object)and overload the comparison operators (==,!=,<,<=,>,>=). That’s because the CLR cannot automatically call yourCompareToimplementation fromEquals(object)or from the base comparison operator implementations. Additionally, it is best practice to overrideGetHashCodealong withEquals.This rule raises an issue when a class implementsIComparablewithout also overridingEquals(object)and the comparison operators.Noncompliant code examplepublic class Foo: IComparable // Noncompliant { public int CompareTo(object obj) { /* ..
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

logic.detection_conditions: Class implements IComparable without overriding Equals and comparison operators
logic.triggering_conditions: Class inherits IComparable/IComparable<T> but missing 'override bool Equals' or comparison operators
logic.exclusion_conditions: Exclude classes with full implementation (Equals + all 6 operators), abstract classes, test code
logic.reasoning: Enforces that classes implementing IComparable must also override Equals(object) and all comparison operators (==, !=, <, >, <=, >=). The CLR cannot automatically call CompareTo from Equals or base operators. Detects classes with 'IComparable' in declaration but missing required operators. Uses multiple checks: one for IComparable presence, and exclusion patterns to avoid false positives when all members are present. This catches incomplete implementations.

should_trigger: public class Foo : IComparable { public int CompareTo(object obj) { } }
public class Bar : IComparable<Bar> { public int CompareTo(Bar other) { } }
public class Baz : IComparable { public int CompareTo(object obj) { } public static bool operator ==(Baz a, Baz b) { } }
should_not_trigger: public class Foo : IComparable { public int CompareTo(object obj) { } public override bool Equals(object obj) { } public static bool operator ==(Foo a, Foo b) { } public static bool operator !=(Foo a, Foo b) { } public static bool operator <(Foo a, Foo b) { } public static bool operator >(Foo a, Foo b) { } public static bool operator <=(Foo a, Foo b) { } public static bool operator >=(Foo a, Foo b) { } }
public class Bar { public override bool Equals(object obj) { } }
